message:
fix(abi): complete stdio_abi.rs syscall migration

Migrate remaining 26 libc::syscall calls in popen/pclose:
- popen: pipe2, fcntl, clone, close, dup2, execve, exit_group
- pclose: wait4
- tmpfile: openat
- freopen: close

Removes unused c_long import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
